title: Create Nuclear Tech
description: Create nuclear tech is port hbm ntm on minecraft 1.21.1 but with create mod base
body:
**CreateNuclearTech** is an industrial Minecraft addon that expands the Create experience with nuclear technology, radiation, advanced materials, and dangerous high-tier production. The mod adds new ores, alloys, machines, protective equipment, radioactive resources, and a full nuclear-themed progression path designed to fit naturally into technical survival gameplay.

With CreateNuclearTech, players can mine and process new resources, work with uranium, thorium, plutonium, neptunium, cobalt-60, iridium-192, and other materials, then use them in more advanced crafting and production chains. The mod is built around Create-style automation and also integrates with mods like TFMG, Chemica, Crowns, and JEI, making it feel like an extension of an existing industrial setup rather than a separate system.

Radiation is one of the core mechanics of the mod. Radioactive items and contaminated areas can become dangerous, so players need proper protection and tools before handling them. Hazmat suits, radiation tongs, Geiger counters, radiation scanner goggles, and Antiradin help you survive and manage the risks of nuclear industry.

The mod also introduces nuclear bombs and the aftermath of nuclear explosions, including smoke effects, fallout ash, scorched earth, radioactive trinitite, dead leaves, and destroyed environments. Nuclear technology is powerful, but it comes with real consequences, making preparation and safety an important part of progression.

**Main Features:**

- Nuclear technology built for Create-based modpacks
- Radiation and radiation sickness mechanics
- Multiple tiers of hazmat protection
- Geiger counter, radiation scanner goggles, radiation tongs, and Antiradin
- New ores and materials such as thorium, beryllium, niter, cinnabar, and more
- Plutonium, neptunium, yellowcake, cobalt-60 sources, and iridium-192 sources
- New machines, including the Lead Irradiation Box, Blast Furnace, and High-Speed Alloy Mixer
- Advanced alloys, plates, components, and nuclear crafting materials
- Nuclear bomb with visual effects and environmental aftermath
- Integration with Create, TFMG, Chemica, Crowns, and JEI

**CreateNuclearTech** is made for players who enjoy complex factories, dangerous experiments, technical progression, and industrial automation. It adds more than just new items: it introduces new risks, new production goals, and a reason to build carefully planned facilities instead of simple machines.
